en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Nicaraguan Industrial Hygiene and Safety License in the Nicaragua Hygiene and Safety Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Nicaragua Industrial Hygiene and Safety License

The Industrial Hygiene and Safety License certifies that a company complies with all Nicaraguan legal requirements for occupational hygiene and safety, allowing legal operation. The license can be obtained directly from the Ministry of Labor (MITRAB). Law No. 618, General Law on Occupational Health and Safety (Art. 7, 41, 48, 50, 52)
Please upload your Industrial Hygiene and Safety License.
Please enter the issue date of your Industrial Hygiene and Safety License.
The standard validity period is three years.
Please enter the expiration date of your Industrial Hygiene and Safety License.
